summary: Unisound releases U2, a native agentic large model for execution
Perplexity introduces Search as Code for AI models
Alibaba releases Qwen3.7-Plus, a multimodal AI model that combines visual understanding with agent capabilities
Google releases TurboVec, an open-source vector indexing library for compressing and searching large datasets
Zilliz introduces Loon, a new storage engine for vector data that never stops changing
NVIDIA releases Nemotron 3 Ultra, a 550B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model for efficient reasoning in long-running agents
Casper Network launches AI Toolkit, enabling AI agents to transact autonomously and write, test, and deploy new applications without human guidance
Jo introduces a statically typed programming language where side effects are denied by default and authority must be granted explicitly
NVIDIA launches Cosmos 3, the world's first fully open foundation model that combines vision reasoning, world generation, and action prediction
Contorium releases v0.8.1, a persistent project memory layer for AI development with a cognitive memory layer and intent system
Meshy launches 3D Agent Beta for AI 3D creation
Google releases Gemma 4 12B, a dense multimodal model that discards traditional separate vision and audio encoders
Microsoft releases ASSERT, an open-source framework that turns AI-agent policies into executable tests
Meta releases Business Agent for WhatsApp Business globally
Nex-AGI releases Nex-N2, an agentic model for real-world productivity
Ideogram releases Ideogram 4, a 9.3B parameter open-weight text-to-image model
Microsoft AI launches seven new MAI models, including MAI-Thinking-1, for various tasks like reasoning and coding
Hcompany releases Holo3.1, a fast and local computer-use model for seamless integration with agent frameworks
Microsoft AI releases MAI-Transcribe-1.5, a multilingual speech-to-text model with best-in-class Word-Error-Rate
Microsoft AI releases MAI-Code-1-Flash, a coding model built for fast and efficient assistance in developer workflows

topic: Integrated Embeddings in Azure Cosmos DB
summary: Microsoft announces public preview of Integrated Embeddings in Azure Cosmos DB for building AI apps with embeddings
NVIDIA releases a major collection of open source agent tools and skills for physical AI
GitHub launches Copilot app for agent-native desktop experience
Codex introduces role-specific plugins and Sites preview
MiniMax releases M3, an open-weight model with a million-token context window and native multimodality
JetBrains releases Mellum2, a 12B Mixture-of-Experts model for efficient text-and-code workloads
Chalk launches Chalk Compute, an enterprise-grade agent runtime that deploys sandboxes directly inside a private cloud
Zoom launches ZoomMate, an agentic AI work surface that turns conversations into completed work
Microsoft releases Agent Governance Toolkit v4.0.0, a framework for policy enforcement, zero-trust identity, and reliability engineering for autonomous AI agents
StepFun releases Step-3.7-Flash, a 198B MoE model with 256K context window
SenseTime releases SenseNova U1, an 8B open-source image generation model
